subcodes.first_line: The Truth, glorified be His majesty, created the world and all that dwell therein through His Most Exalted Word, and thereafter raised up the Prophets, the chosen ones and the divine messengers [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حق جل جلاله عالم و اهل آنرا بکلمه علیا خلق فرمود و بعد انبیا و اولیا و سفرا
subcodes.subjects: @mission of the Manifestation of God in the world, @Word of God the cause of creation
